## na

### Sense 1: lexicon

- **Pronunciation:** `NA`
- **Part of speech:** pronoun
- **Definition:** I; me
- **Register/status:** relational; accepted
- **Domains:** daily-life, family-kinship
- **Literal:** relational stance: self
- **Example:** Na val.
- **Corpus:** common (3000 attestations); tracks: civic-law, daily-dialogues, learner-graded, literary-poetic, ritual-vow, technical-software; examples in civic-006, civic-024, daily-001, daily-002, daily-004, daily-005, daily-007, daily-008, ...

### Sense 2: pronoun

- **Pronunciation:** `NA`
- **Part of speech:** pronoun:first:singular
- **Definition:** I; me
- **Register/status:** relational; accepted
- **Domains:** daily-life, family-kinship
- **Literal:** Unmarked first person.
- **Example:** Na val.
- **Corpus:** common (3000 attestations); tracks: civic-law, daily-dialogues, learner-graded, literary-poetic, ritual-vow, technical-software; examples in civic-006, civic-024, daily-001, daily-002, daily-004, daily-005, daily-007, daily-008, ...
- **Notes:** Relational stance: self.

## nab

### Sense 1: lexicon

- **Pronunciation:** `NAB`
- **Part of speech:** verb
- **Definition:** to count, number, or quantify
- **Register/status:** plain; accepted
- **Domains:** education-training, ai-cognition, philosophy-metaphysics, science-math, travel-place
- **Root family:** `NB`; Mind; number, count, quantity; number, count, quantity, ordered amount
- **Pattern:** verb
- **Literal:** N-B root, action vowel a
- **Example:** Na nab.
- **Corpus:** common (12 attestations); tracks: civic-law, learner-graded, technical-software; examples in civic-053, civic-095, learner-381, learner-820, tech-064, tech-780

- **Pronunciation:** `NACALAD-LEM`
- **Part of speech:** noun
- **Definition:** collective body, guild, or people organized around: on-call duty, rotating readiness
- **Register/status:** plain; accepted
- **Domains:** technology-software, ai-cognition, media-communication
- **Root family:** `NCLD`; Technology; on-call duty, rotating readiness; on-call duty, rotating readiness to answer urgent system, service, or public failure
- **Pattern:** collective
- **Literal:** N-C-L-D root, collective suffix -lem
- **Example:** Nacalad-lem lem pu nam.
- **Corpus:** unattested (0 attestations)

## nacalad-ret

### Sense 1: lexicon

- **Pronunciation:** `NACALAD-RET`

### Sense 1: lexicon

- **Pronunciation:** `NACALAD-TEL`

- **Example:** Na ban bi nacalad-tel.

- **Pronunciation:** `NACAR-WED`
- **Part of speech:** noun
- **Definition:** place, arena, or field where this root is enacted: insurance, pooled risk
- **Register/status:** plain; accepted
- **Domains:** law-governance, economics-provision, travel-place
- **Root family:** `NCR`; Law/civic life; insurance, pooled risk; insurance, pooled risk, promise of repair after loss
- **Pattern:** place
- **Literal:** N-C-R root, place suffix -wed
- **Example:** Nel pat ad nacar-wed.
- **Corpus:** unattested (0 attestations)

- **Pronunciation:** `NATARAX-GA`
- **Part of speech:** noun
- **Definition:** ongoing process, practice, or craft of: to charge interest, price borrowed time, or reckon cost across delay
- **Register/status:** technical; accepted
- **Root family:** `NTRX`; Economics/provision; interest rate, borrowed-time price; interest rate, price of borrowed time, cost of deferred payment
- **Pattern:** process
- **Literal:** N-T-R-X root, process suffix -ga
- **Example:** Natarax-ga ga ban rih.
- **Corpus:** unattested (0 attestations)
